blocks.text: Relays, Title Races, and Reitan: Norway's Biggest Saturday of February

Reitan leads the Cognizant Classic in Florida; Norway's biathlon squad fires a double-header in Kontiolahti. Then football delivers: Liverpool's title crunch, Barcelona-Villarreal, and a Premier League avalanche.
⛳ Cognizant Classic — Kristoffer Reitan in top contention, Saturday round tees off in Florida | 06:00
🏅 Biathlon Women's 12.5km Mass Start — Røiseland and Kirkeeide chase Kontiolahti podium | 12:40
🏅 Biathlon Men's Relay 4×7.5km — Thingnes Bø spearheads Norway's relay charge in Kontiolahti | 14:40
